response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They have worked on various projects that demonstrate their ability to design, develop, and maintain end-to-end features.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with AI agent development and various testing frameworks
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Some secondary technologies like Kotlin/Java are mentioned but not extensively used
No direct mention of experience with PostgreSQL or cloud platforms like AWS/GCP/Azure

key_factors.factor: Limited experience with specific primary stack technologies
